race.comment: Local trainer Tom Dabernig has a huge hand in the race with five runners including three top chances. DU CLISSON (12) comes out on top after a close-up return over 1000m at Mornington. Fitter and is a second-up winner. Looks well placed here and expected to go close. Stablemate ROMANTIC MISS (10) was a huge winner fresh then safely held in stakes class over the border latest. Better suited back to this grade and will take catching off the low draw. Another local galloper could prove the fly in the ointment in WINTERY (8). The speedy filly has been kept fresh for this after being safely held in the Gold Dash but best form stacks up and returns at home. GWEN'S GIRL (13) is another Dabernig runner who looks a top chance - with a good steer from Meech. Poorly drawn but has pace and can take beating fresh. ARIZONA LUCK (16) is another off a tricky gate but anticipating her to hit the ground running this campaign.

Live1.SchedulerNote: Provincial **Use extended Racing.com coverage where possible**
